description: Open-source Docker-like packaging, compiler, and runtime layer for AI agent workflows.

..purpose: Project root for Capsule source-of-truth files, Python package metadata, docs, examples, and tests.

docs.purpose: Human-readable implementation notes, MVP usage notes, and generated schema artifacts.

docs/site.purpose: Premium interactive documentation site assets, including HTML layouts, custom styling sheets, and JS explorers.

examples.purpose: Checked-in Capsule workflow examples, including MVP Python tools and P1 MCP declarations.

examples/mcp-research-agent.purpose: P1 example Capsule project demonstrating declaration-only MCP tools with mocked tests.

examples/mcp-research-agent/agents.purpose: Prompt files for the MCP research example agents.

examples/mcp-research-agent/examples.purpose: Input JSON examples for the MCP research workflow.

examples/mcp-research-agent/tests.purpose: YAML Capsule workflow tests with mocked MCP tool output.

examples/refund-support-agent.purpose: MVP example Capsule project used for CLI smoke checks and tests.

examples/refund-support-agent/agents.purpose: Prompt files for the refund support example agents.

examples/refund-support-agent/examples.purpose: Input JSON examples for running the refund support workflow.

examples/refund-support-agent/tests.purpose: YAML Capsule workflow tests for the refund support example.

examples/refund-support-agent/tools.purpose: Python tools used by the refund support example workflow.

examples/translation-editor-agent.purpose: P1 example project demonstrating runtime permission checks, a custom python translation tool, and multi-agent workflow testing.

examples/translation-editor-agent/agents.purpose: Prompt files for the translation editor workflow agents.

examples/translation-editor-agent/exampl.purpose: Input JSON examples for the translation editor workflow.

examples/translation-editor-agent/tests.purpose: YAML workflow tests with mock tools configurations for the translation editor workflow.

examples/translation-editor-agent/tools.purpose: Python tools (including file writing) for the translation editor workflow.

src/capsule/adapters.purpose: Compiler adapters for target agent runtimes.

src/capsule/bundle.purpose: Lockfile generation with schema/tool metadata, .capsule archive generation, bundle inspection, and bundle verification.

src/capsule/cli.purpose: Typer CLI commands and Rich terminal rendering.

src/capsule/graph.purpose: Framework-neutral Capsule Graph models, builder, JSON serialization, and inspection output.

src/capsule/history.purpose: SQLite-backed local run history models and storage.

src/capsule/runtime.purpose: Local Capsule graph execution, input/output schema enforcement, Python tool loading, and mocked MCP declaration handling.

src/capsule/security.purpose: Permission checks, static security scans, MCP declaration warnings, and security helpers.

src/capsule/spec.purpose: capsule.yaml schema models, Python/MCP tool declaration shapes, payload JSON Schema helpers, manifest JSON Schema generation, YAML loading, and safe path helpers.

src/capsule/testing.purpose: YAML workflow test models and test runner.

src/capsule/validate.purpose: Validation diagnostics and project validation rules for schemas, tools, workflow, and security-sensitive declarations.

tests.purpose: Automated tests for the Capsule MVP vertical slice and P1 extension slices.

.gitignore.purpose: Ignores local environments, generated caches, generated dist outputs, generated Capsule lockfiles, and local .capsule run history folders.

README.md.purpose: Short project introduction, developer quickstart, input/output schema note, MVP example commands, and MCP declaration example commands.

docs/capsule.schema.json.purpose: Generated JSON Schema for capsule.yaml editor tooling and external validation, including Python and MCP tool declarations.

docs/logo.png.purpose: Project logo displayed in the README and documentation.

codex.md.purpose: Development rules and implementation map for keeping Capsule modular, secure, beginner-readable, source-of-truth aligned, and easy to navigate.

gemini.md.purpose: AI development rules and checklists followed by Gemini when working on Capsule.

docs/mvp.md.purpose: MVP usage notes, P1 MCP declaration notes, and CLI commands for checked-in example workflows.

docs/site/index.html.purpose: Interactive HTML page presenting the Capsule documentation and Spec Explorer UI.

docs/site/main.js.purpose: Interactive JS controller for tab switches, copy utility triggers, and data loading for the YAML Spec Explorer.

docs/site/style.css.purpose: Premium glassmorphic styling, custom scrollbars, typography, and responsive sheets for the documentation UI.

examples/refund-support-agent/agents/res.purpose: Responder prompt for the refund support example.

examples/refund-support-agent/agents/tri.purpose: Triage prompt for the refund support example.

examples/refund-support-agent/capsule.ya.purpose: Checked-in Capsule manifest for the refund support MVP example, including input and output JSON Schemas.

examples/refund-support-agent/examples/r.purpose: JSON input used to run the refund support example workflow.

examples/refund-support-agent/tests/refu.purpose: Capsule workflow test case for the refund support example.

examples/refund-support-agent/tools/draf.purpose: Example Python tool that drafts the final refund reply.

examples/refund-support-agent/tools/poli.purpose: Example Python tool that returns refund policy and routing data.

examples/mcp-research-agent/agents/resea.purpose: Researcher prompt for the MCP declaration example.

examples/mcp-research-agent/capsule.yaml.purpose: Checked-in Capsule manifest demonstrating declaration-only MCP tool metadata and payload schemas.

examples/mcp-research-agent/examples/top.purpose: JSON input used to demonstrate the MCP research example.

examples/mcp-research-agent/tests/resear.purpose: Capsule workflow test case that mocks an MCP tool result.

examples/translation-editor-agent/agents.purpose: Prompt instructions file for the editor agent step.
Prompt instructions file for the translator agent step.

examples/translation-editor-agent/capsul.purpose: Manifest file configuration for the translation editor agent workflow example.

examples/translation-editor-agent/exampl.purpose: Input JSON payload sample containing target text to translate.

examples/translation-editor-agent/tests/.purpose: Capsule workflow testing rules and assertion mocks for the translation editor agent.

examples/translation-editor-agent/tools/.purpose: Python tool entrypoint writing translated buffers to target local file paths.

manifest.json.purpose: Navigation map of every important file and folder in the Capsule project. Must be updated whenever structure changes.

plan.md.purpose: Production PRD for Capsule covering vision, positioning, users, MVP scope, architecture, public interfaces, security requirements, roadmap, risks, and acceptance criteria.

pyproject.toml.purpose: Python project metadata, runtime/dev dependencies, CLI entrypoint, pytest config, Ruff config, and Hatch package selection.

src/capsule/__main__.py.purpose: Enables running Capsule with python -m capsule.

src/capsule/adapters/langgraph/compiler..purpose: Compiles a Capsule Graph into a readable LangGraph project with generated Python tool execution, declaration-only MCP stubs, and branch routing.

src/capsule/adapters/openai_agents/__ini.purpose: OpenAI Agents SDK adapter package marker.

src/capsule/adapters/openai_agents/compi.purpose: Compiles a Capsule Graph into a readable OpenAI Agents SDK project with generated Python tool execution, stubs, and handoffs.

src/capsule/adapters/crewai/compiler.py.purpose: Compiles a Capsule Graph into a readable CrewAI Flow project with generated Python tool execution, stubs, and routing.

src/capsule/bundle/builder.py.purpose: Builds .capsule zip archives from validated project assets, copying Python tool files while preserving declaration-only tools through metadata.

src/capsule/bundle/inspector.py.purpose: Inspects .capsule archives and reports metadata, lockfile presence, manifest presence, and included files.

src/capsule/bundle/lockfile.py.purpose: Builds capsule.lock data with schema metadata, tool metadata, Python tool hashes, and writes lockfiles.

src/capsule/bundle/verifier.py.purpose: Verifies .capsule archive structure, schema metadata, tool metadata, and prompt/Python-tool/test hashes against capsule.lock.

src/capsule/cli/app.py.purpose: Typer CLI commands for init, validate, scan, schema, graph, inspect, run, history, show-run, test, compile, build, inspect-bundle, and verify-bundle.

src/capsule/cli/render.py.purpose: Rich terminal rendering helpers for validation, security scans, test reports, bundle inspection, bundle verification, run history, and run records.

src/capsule/graph/builder.py.purpose: Builds the framework-neutral Capsule Graph from a loaded project.

src/capsule/graph/inspect.py.purpose: Creates readable Capsule Graph summaries, including schema declarations, for the inspect command.

src/capsule/graph/models.py.purpose: Capsule Graph Pydantic models, including neutral input and output schema fields.

src/capsule/graph/serialize.py.purpose: Serializes the framework-neutral Capsule Graph to JSON for debugging and tooling.

src/capsule/history/models.py.purpose: Run history Pydantic models and local SQLite path helper.

src/capsule/history/store.py.purpose: SQLite storage API for recording, listing, and reading local Capsule runs.

src/capsule/project/scaffold.py.purpose: Creates starter Capsule projects for capsule init, including payload schemas and starter .gitignore rules for generated history and build artifacts.

src/capsule/runtime/executor.py.purpose: Executes Capsule Graph workflows locally with input/output schema enforcement, branching, human gates, permissions, Python tool calls, and mocked MCP tool handling.

src/capsule/runtime/tool_loader.py.purpose: Loads and calls declared Python tool entrypoints safely within the project.

src/capsule/runtime/trace.py.purpose: Run trace and run result models.

src/capsule/security/scan.py.purpose: Static security scanner for risky permission labels, declaration-only MCP tools, and risky Python tool source patterns.

src/capsule/spec/models.py.purpose: Pydantic models for capsule.yaml, including Python/MCP tool declarations and optional input_schema/output_schema declarations.

src/capsule/spec/paths.py.purpose: Safe project path and Python tool entrypoint helpers.

src/capsule/spec/payload_schema.py.purpose: Shared JSON Schema validation helpers for manifest-declared input and output payload schemas.

src/capsule/spec/schema.py.purpose: Generates the Capsule manifest JSON Schema from Pydantic models.

src/capsule/testing/models.py.purpose: Pydantic models for Capsule YAML workflow tests and reports.

src/capsule/testing/runner.py.purpose: Runs Capsule workflow tests with mocked tool responses, schema failure reporting, and assertions.

src/capsule/validate/rules.py.purpose: Validation rules for manifests, payload schemas, paths, workflow edges, tools, permissions, tests, and static security warnings.

tests/test_bundle_and_compile.py.purpose: Tests bundle creation, bundle inspection, schema lock metadata verification, LangGraph compiler output, and generated adapter runtime parity.

tests/test_compile_openai_agents.py.purpose: Tests OpenAI Agents SDK compiler output and generated agent structure.

tests/test_compile_crewai.py.purpose: Tests CrewAI Flow compiler output and generated agent structure.

tests/test_runtime_permissions.py.purpose: Verify runtime execution security gates, interactive prompt overrides, CLI flags, and exception handling.

tests/test_runtime_testing.py.purpose: Tests local runtime execution, input/output schema enforcement, and YAML workflow test runner.

tests/test_graph_cli.py.purpose: Tests graph CLI JSON output and graph file writing.

tests/test_scaffold.py.purpose: Tests project scaffolding, generated project ignore rules, and the capsule init CLI path.

tests/test_schema.py.purpose: Tests manifest JSON Schema generation, Python/MCP tool schema shape, and schema CLI output/write behavior.

tests/test_history.py.purpose: Tests SQLite-backed run history storage plus run, history, show-run, and no-history CLI behavior.

tests/test_mcp_tools.py.purpose: Tests declaration-only MCP tool validation, mocked runtime behavior, security visibility, bundling, and LangGraph compilation metadata.

tests/test_security_scan.py.purpose: Tests static security scan warnings for risky permissions, risky tool source patterns, and scan CLI output.

tests/test_validation_errors.py.purpose: Tests actionable validation errors for missing prompts, unknown tools, invalid workflow edges, undeclared permissions, and invalid payload schemas.

tests/test_spec_validate_graph.py.purpose: Tests manifest loading, validation, Capsule Graph building with payload schemas, and graph serialization.

uv.lock.purpose: uv dependency lockfile generated from pyproject.toml.
